daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await!

top_events.title: Rocket Lab's HASTE Mission
top_events.description: Rocket Lab's Electron rocket will launch the 'That's Not A Knife' mission for the US Department of Defense, testing hypersonic technologies.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for cutting-edge technology in action.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A potential aurora event with a Kp index of 4.33 is forecasted, offering a chance for aurora sightings at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check northern skies for auroras if weather permits.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha's Return-To-Flight
top_events.description: Firefly Aerospace's Alpha rocket will conduct a test flight to validate key systems after a previous launch failure.
top_events.action: Follow the mission to see Firefly's progress in space technology.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
